Restriction: Permission of ARCH-School of Architecture, Planning, & Preservation.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

848 RDEV - Real Estate Development

RDEV600 Principles and Practice of Real Property Development (3 Credits)

An introduction to basic principles of real estate development: How real estate and communities get built and how value is created. The emphasis is on entrepreneurship and an experiential learning approach to the entrepreneurial real estate development process, principles, and practice. Restriction: Permission of ARCH-Real Estate Development.

Credit Only Granted for. RDEV688T or RDEV600.
